content.title: Pattern 1: Error Handling Best Practices
content.preview: Learn how to handle errors gracefully...

content.markdown: Error handling is crucial for production applications. Here's a comprehensive approach:

items: Always catch specific error types when possible
Log errors with sufficient context for debugging
Consider retry logic for transient failures
